title: Safe local live relationship-drafting probe CLI
problem: Tickets 061-062 proved report-only live claim extraction and concept linking. build-relationships still requires persisted claims, concepts, and SQLite writes. Operators need a no-DB live probe for relationship drafting before any graph persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Live probe with qwen2.5:7b yields accepted_count >= 1 on default bundle fixture.
db_writes remains false; report under data/reports/live_probes/.
validate_relationship_candidates unchanged; GT06 still passes mock-only.
Rejected live probe rows include validation_diagnostic notes.
Mock/default pytest and CI remain green without Ollama.
test_plan: Manual live: probe-draft-relationships with ollama opt-in
non_goals: Do not persist relationships or evidence to default DB or public exports.
Do not add OpenAI/OpenRouter or API keys.
Do not add contradiction-detection live probes.
Do not weaken relationship validation rules.
rollback_plan: Revert CLI, probe helper, prompt calibration, fixtures, and tests. No schema migrations.
